sentences.arabic: الْآدَابُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ جُزْءٌ مِنَ الدِّينِ وَلَيْسَتْ زِيَادَةً عَلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Islamski adab je dio vjere, a ne nešto što se dodaje na nju.
sentences.translationEn: Islamic manners are part of the religion, not an addition to it.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ مِنْ أَحَبِّكُمْ إِلَيَّ وَأَقْرَبِكُمْ مِنِّي مَجْلِسًا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ أَحَاسِنَكُمْ أَخْلَاقًا» [رَوَاهُ التِّرْمِذِيُّ وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Najdraži od vas meni i najbliži mi na sijelu na Sudnjem danu su oni koji imaju najljepše ahlake.'
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'The most beloved of you to me and the closest to me in sitting on the Day of Resurrection are those of you with the best character.'

sentences.arabic: وَحُسْنُ الْخُلُقِ يَشْمَلُ الصِّدْقَ وَالتَّوَاضُعَ وَاللُّطْفَ مَعَ النَّاسِ جَمِيعًا.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi Tirmizi, vjerodostojnim ga ocijenio Albani] Lijep ahlak obuhvata istinitost, skromnost i ljubaznost prema svim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: [Narrated by al-Tirmidhi, authenticated by al-Albani] Good character includes truthfulness, humility and kindness to all people.

sentences.arabic: فَعَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَتَخَلَّقَ بِالْأَخْلَاقِ الْحَسَنَةِ فِي بَيْتِهِ وَمَعَ جِيرَانِهِ وَفِي عَمَلِهِ، لِأَنَّ حُسْنَ الْخُلُقِ هُوَ وَجْهُ الْإِسْلَامِ أَمَامَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora njegovati lijepo ponašanje u svom domu, prema komšijama i na poslu, jer je lijep ahlak lice islama pred ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must adopt good manners in his home, with his neighbours and at work, because good character is the face of Islam before people.
